session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command **FAILED** with exit code 2.
## Summary
**Overall Result**: FAILED - Prettier code style violations
### Failures
**Prettier formatting violations found in 3 files:** 1. `.claude/commands/erk/pr-address.md` 2. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 3. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
The Prettier check reports: "Code style issues found in 3 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix."
### Passing Checks
All other checks passed successfully: - **Lint** - All checks passed - **Format Check** - 1730 files already formatted - **Markdown Check** - Passed - **Exec Reference Check** - OK - **ty** - All checks passed - **AGENTS.md standard** - PASSED - **Unit Tests (erk)** - 6009 passed in 14.66s - **Tests (erk-dev)** - 136 passed in 5.93s - **Tests (erk-statusline)** - 123 passed in 0.77s - **Tests (erk-mcp)** - 50 passed
### Root Cause
The three Markdown files need formatting updates according to Prettier's style standards. These are the only remaining failures blocking the CI pipeline.
